creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to craig001 from comment #2)
> old thunderbird fix for sparc64 see PR 186580

That fix was upstreamed years ago. Later sparc64 conditional migrated from Makefile.in to moz.build.

https://hg.mozilla.org/mozilla-central/rev/0688cd4ca145
https://dxr.mozilla.org/mozilla-central/rev/2b5237c178ea/xpcom/reflect/xptcall/md/unix/moz.build#259
